bias.description: does not build CDF packages, validation verdicts, receipts, checkpoints, mirrors, or destination commit gate
generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches rather than reading source Parquet bytes
uses the DuckDB crate Arrow type directly; CDF destination crosses the pinned Arrow C stream bridge
intentionally omits _cdf_row_key to isolate provenance-column cost from persistent appender cost

reference.name: duckdb
reference.semantic_work: persistent DuckDB Arrow appender over synthetic TLC-shaped batches without CDF row provenance column and with checkpoint
